title: The New Testamant in Bugun
title_vernacular: Iwo Surua Mua Wie Pha Bible

language.name: Bugun
language.area: Arunachal Pradesh, West Kameng District, Singchung and Nafra circles, Wangho, Singchung, New Kaspi, Namphri, Mangopom, Diching, Sachita, Ramu, Situ, Lichini, Dikiang, and Bichom villages on the mountains on both sides of Rupa River, interspersed among the Aka.
